name: Chocolate Chip Shortbread Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, confectioners' sugar, and vanilla until blended.
2. Gradually add in the flour on low speed.
3. Stir in half of the chocolate chips.
4. Cover and chill until firm but still workable (let it sit for a while if necessary).
5. Shape heaping tablespoons into 3-inch-long, 1/2-inch-thick logs.
6. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Cool completely.
9. Melt the remaining chocolate and vegetable oil, then dip about three-quarters of an inch of one end of each cookie into the melted chocolate.
10. Makes 36 cookies.
